resolutions.title: Schedules a Public Hearing by the Town of Riverhead, as Legislative Body for the Town of Riverhead and Governing Body of the Community Development Agency to Consider the Designation of The Jazz Loft, Inc., as a Qualified and Eligible Sponsor for the Purchase and Redevelopment of Town-Owned Property Described as SCTM# 0600-128.00-6.00-080.00 Located at 18 Peconic Avenue, Riverhead, New York 11901 RESULT: ADOPTED [4 - 1] MOVER: Councilman Kenneth Rothwell SECONDER: Councilman Robert Kern AYES: Tim Hubbard, Kenneth Rothwell, Denise Merrifield, Joann Waski NAYS: Robert Kern VI.
